methods.description: Process for conducting clinical examinations on children in the Swedish birth cohort BAMSE, including lung-function testing and blood sampling for measuring serum immunoglobulin E (IgE) against common allergens.

steps.description: Children underwent clinical examination including lung-function testing and blood sampling for measuring serum immunoglobulin E (IgE) against common airborne and food allergens.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct clinical examination and collect blood samples for IgE measurement

methods.description: Collection of daily measurements of pollen counts and air pollution data from monitoring stations in Stockholm.

steps.description: Daily measurements of pollen counts for nine types of pollen were collected from the Swedish Museum of Natural History.
steps.searchable_summary: collect daily pollen count data from Swedish Museum of Natural History

steps.description: Ozone, nitrogen dioxide (NO2), particulate matter with aerodynamic diameter <10 lm (PM10) and <2.5 lm (PM2.5) data were collected from roof-level urban background monitoring stations within central Stockholm.
steps.searchable_summary: collect air pollution data from Stockholm monitoring stations

methods.description: Application of linear regression analyses to assess associations between pollen concentrations and lung function, adjusted for potential confounders.

steps.description: Linear regression analyses were applied to assess associations between pollen concentrations and lung function.
steps.searchable_summary: perform linear regression analysis on pollen and lung function data

steps.description: All results were adjusted for sex, age, height and allergic heredity.
steps.searchable_summary: adjust regression results for demographic variables

steps.description: Air pollution exposure was evaluated as a potential confounder.
steps.searchable_summary: evaluate air pollution as a confounder in regression analysis
